4.description: find grid cells that intersect storm-surge polygons

5.description: count distinct grid cell ids intersecting storm-surge (group per id)

6.description: total count of unique grid cells intersecting storm-surge

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, ST_XMin(omrade) AS xmin, ST_YMin(omrade) AS ymin, ST_XMax(omrade) AS xmax, ST_YMax(omrade) AS ymax, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [statistiskrutenett1km]
SELECT id, geom FROM public.statistiskrutenett1km WHERE geom && ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368,6428946.019998128,107683.72996255726,6493405.01999838,25833) AND ST_Intersects(geom, ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368,6428946.019998128,107683.72996255726,6493405.01999838,25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, omrade FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE omrade && ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368,6428946.019998128,107683.72996255726,6493405.01999838,25833) AND ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368,6428946.019998128,107683.72996255726,6493405.01999838,25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 2
-- right_source: 3
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "geom"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 5: aggregate
-- source_step: 4
-- aggregation_type: "count"
-- group_by: ["id"]
-- metric_as: "count"

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 6: aggregate
-- source_step: 5
-- aggregation_type: "count"
-- metric_as: "count"
